segments.text: We have come to Mumbai and all the people from around the world are here.

It is like an industry
And now it has decreased a lot, Kali Vidyas have decreased a lot
that the black schools have shut down.
We should make an advertisement about it
The second thing is, by drinking alcohol
this was also a good thing here
because if there were time
then what would people do?
They sit and drink alcohol
That's why how many losses are there
they don't think
How much money does one have
he thinks

from these fields

she washed our clothes
went to jail

how many times did they go to jail
for 2 or 3 years

but still she sacrificed so much
that's why
You don't have to make any sacrifices for the sake of the society.

so take that blessing. For this you need not give anything
but whatever work is done I find it surprising
that Mumbaikars made such a great effort
